athanor 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Pipelines
    • Main processing pipeline: GEX, concatenation, and WNN
    • Visualization
    • Color palettes in athanor
    • Visualizing scRNA-Seq data with plot_dimplot()
  • Changelog

Package index

General

General functions for processing and analyzing single-cell data.

object_overview()
Print an overview of a Seurat object.
regen_reduc()
Regenerate neighbor graphs and UMAPs.
seurat_pipeline()
Run Seurat's standard pipeline

Quality Control

Functions for QC and filtering.

reformat_vdj_barcode()
Reformat VDJ barcodes to make them unique across samples
reformat_vdj_barcode_sample()
Reformat VDJ barcodes by adding sample names and removing suffixes

Gene Expression

Functions for processing and analyzing gene expression data.

Pipeline

filter_variable_features()
Filter AIRR genes from variable features
get_airr_genes()
Get IG and TR genes from Ensembl using biomaRt

Cell type annotation

add_annotations()
Add a user-specified list of cluster annotations to a Seurat object
automated_annotation()
Run automated cell type annotation

Clustering-related

cell_type_clusters()
Map cell types to Seurat clusters
find_k_clusters()
Find the right clustering resolution to obtain the desired number of clusters

Adaptive Immune Receptors

Functions for processing and analyzing adaptive immune receptor data.

Read in data

process_airrflow()
Read in and process output files from nf-core/airrflow

BCR embeddings

bcr_embeddings_pipeline()
Build a Seurat object from BCR embeddings
bcr_embeddings_pipeline_dedup()
Build a Seurat object from BCR embeddings, deduplicating identical embeddings first
convert_embeddings()
Convert the output of an embedding method to a matrix

BCR features

add_family_info()
Add in family and gene information from alakazam
bin_mu_freq()
Bin the mutation frequency
factor_family_info()
Convert family and gene information to sorted factors
process_bcr_features()
Process BCR features for integration

GEX and AIRR Integration

Functions for integrating gene expression and adaptive immune receptor data.

Metadata

gex_add_airr()
Add AIRR information to a Seurat object

Seurat objects

infer_k_param()
Infer k_param from existing RNA neighbors, or return a default.
infer_num_dims()
Infer num_dims (PCA dims used for neighbor finding) from existing RNA neighbors.
merge_gex_bcr()
Merge a GEX Seurat object with a BCR Seurat object

Concatenation

concatenate_gex_bcr()
Concatenate GEX and BCR data in a Seurat object

Weighted Nearest Neighbors

run_wnn()
Run Weighted Nearest Neighbors (WNN) analysis on combined GEX and BCR data

Evaluation

Functions for evaluating the performance of models and analyses.

ADT-based

calc_adt_correlation()
Calculate the correlation between each cell's expression and the mean of its neighbors' expression
calc_adt_dists()
Compute mean ADT distance to each cell's k nearest neighbors
calc_adt_mean_absolute()
Calculate mean absolute ADT distance to nearest neighbors
calc_adt_moran()
Calculate Moran's i
calc_adt_nn_within_range()
Calculate the proportion of neighbors within an ADT marker's expression range
calc_adt_quantile()
Calculate the proportion of neighbors within an ADT marker's quantile by expression

Metadata-based

calc_neighbor_matches()
Calculate neighbor matching scores across metadata columns

Permuted baselines

permute_adt()
Compute a permuted baseline for ADT neighbor matching scores
permute_neighbor_matches()
Compute a permuted baseline for neighbor matching scores

Clustering-based

calc_distances()
Calculate cluster distances
calc_ext_metrics()
Calculate external clustering metrics
calc_int_metrics()
Calculate internal clustering metrics

Applications

Functions for applying the package to specific use cases.

Reclassification

Plotting

Functions for visualizing data and results.

Accessory

add_info_bar()
Add an information bar on top of a given ggplot
plot_color_scale()
Generate a color scale for a ggplot2 plot with white at zero

UMAPs

plot_dimplot()
Plot a Seurat UMAP using DimPlot
plot_overview_comps()
Plot several UMAPs side by side

Other plots

calc_pcts()
Calculate percentages per metadata group
plot_doublets()
Plot an overview of a doublet identification method
plot_mws()
Plot a box plot of modality weights per cell type
plot_pcts()
Plot percentages in a stacked bar plot
plot_vln_feat()
Plot a Seurat VlnPlot and a FeaturePlot side by side for the same marker

Simulations

Simulate GEX and AIRR data.

run_wnn_sims()
Run manual WNN simulations by varying a specific variable while keeping others constant
sim_bcr_manual()
Simulate an assay made from BCR embeddings independent of any GEX object
sim_gex_manual()
Manually simulate gene expression data
sim_gex_splatter()
Simulate gene expression data using Splatter

Utilities

Utilities for various tasks.

Colors

named_colors
Named color palettes for athanor plots

Seurat object

reduce_object()
Reduce a Seurat object's size

Themes

clean_dimplot
Clean theme for DimPlots
clean_dimplot2
Clean theme for DimPlots
labels_rotate_x
Rotate x-axis labels 45 degrees
labels_standard
Standard label sizes for athanor plots
labels_standard_vln
Standard label sizes for violin plots
labels_standard_vln_rotate
Violin plot labels with horizontal x-axis text
plot_anno
Patchwork annotation with Roman numeral panel labels
theme_bw_custom
ggplot2 theme with horizontal grid lines only

On this page

Developed by Edel Aron.
